Interface IAlertPanelFactory

Defines a factory for creating alert panels and related components.

The IAlertPanelFactory interface is implemented by the PhiRobotics ui framework and is not intended for consumer implementation.

Namespace: PhiRobotics.UI.AlertPanels
Assembly: PhiRobotics.UI.dll
Syntax
public interface IAlertPanelFactory
Remarks

Consumer code uses this interface to create instances of IAlertPanel and IButton for displaying notifications and alerts.

Consumer code obtains an instance via the AlertPanelFactory property. The lifetime of the factory instance is managed by the framework.

Methods

CreateButton(string)

Creates a new button with the specified name.

Declaration
IButton CreateButton(string name)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string name

The name to give to the new button.
Returns
Type Description
IButton

An IButton object representing the new button.
Exceptions
Type Condition
ArgumentNullException

Thrown, If the specified name is null.

CreatePanel()

Creates an instance of alert panel.

Declaration
IAlertPanel CreatePanel()
Returns
Type Description
IAlertPanel

An instance of newly created alert panel.

CreatePanelInfo(string, string)

Creates a new alert panel info object.

Declaration
IAlertPanelInfo CreatePanelInfo(string caption, string text)
Parameters
Type Name Description
string caption

The alert form’s caption.
string text

The alert form’s text.
Returns
Type Description
IAlertPanelInfo

A newly created an instance of IAlertPanelInfo.
